codeReview.summary: The feature delivers the Candle/Line toggle UI, candlestick styling, and OHLC crosshair wiring, but the real-time candle aggregation logic is incorrect for interval-based candles and can silently miss trades, so expected real-time OHLC behavior is not reliably met.

issues.description: Candlestick aggregation buckets by raw second (`Math.floor(trade.timestamp / 1000)`) and starts a new candle whenever that second changes, instead of bucketing by the active chart interval (1m/5m/15m/1h/1d). This creates second-level candles in candlestick mode and breaks timeframe-consistent OHLC updates.

New trades are filtered with `timeSec > lastUpdateTimestampRef.current`. Any later trade arriving in the same second as the last processed trade is dropped, so high/low/close can miss valid updates for the current candle.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature metadata references `frontend-ui-worker`, but the worker session could not invoke that skill and had to fall back to `frontend-worker`, indicating a mismatch between mission feature config and runnable skill registry.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json for `candlestick-chart-toggle` sets `skillName` to `frontend-ui-worker`; transcript skeleton for session `e1aff43c-452d-4d28-a11f-0683ce538730` contains `Error: Skill "frontend-ui-worker" not found` before invoking `frontend-worker`.

summary: Fail: core toggle/crosshair functionality is present, but real-time candlestick updates are not interval-correct and can drop same-second trades, causing incorrect OHLC behavior.
